title: planemod
body:
# planemod
Control your Minecraft with X-Plane

![Screenshot](https://git.sr.ht/~eviee/planemod/blob/main/assets/screenshot.jpg)

## Getting Started
You'll need [X-Plane 11](https://www.x-plane.com/) and version 1.2.0 of NASA's XPlaneConnect (which can be found on [GitHub](https://github.com/nasa/XPlaneConnect/releases/tag/v1.2.0)).

Once XPlaneConnect is installed into X-Plane 11 (which involves extracting the XPlaneConnect zip into the `resources/plugins` folder of X-Plane), open Minecraft with this mod, and it should automatically connect and control your player.
